content.claim: Formal appeal/review of SNI assessment exists but is time-limited (15 days to initiate review under EMMI 15/2013 §39(10)) and channeled through administrative (not judicial) procedures. Expert-committee reviews are conducted ex officio upon first educational year following implementation or upon parental/authority/institutional request.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: No published data on appeal-success rates or reasons for upholding/overturning decisions
15-day window and administrative-procedure constraints are structural facts, but no formal comparative analysis of due-process adequacy vs. international standards is available in sources
Distinction between first-year ex-officio review and subsequent parent-triggered reviews not quantified for frequency or outcome
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
